name: 产品多角度网格

prompt_template.subject: {product_description}
prompt_template.quality: 8K, catalog photography, uniform lighting across all cells

overrides.variation: front, side, back, top-down, 3/4 angle views
same product in different colors, consistent 3/4 angle
each cell shows different product feature with label and icon
overrides.grid: hero image left + 4 smaller shots right column

overrides.variation: before/after or product vs competitor in side-by-side grid

category_tips.beauty: show bottle angle, cap detail, texture close-up, and open product
category_tips.electronics: show front face, side ports, back panel, and included accessories
category_tips.fashion: show front view, back view, detail close-up, and fabric texture
category_tips.food: show packaging front, back nutrition, open product, and serving suggestion
category_tips.home: show full product, detail angle, material texture, and in-context shot
category_tips.sports: show product front, side profile, sole/bottom, and action usage shot

examples: 2x2 product grid. {product} shown from 4 angles: front, side, back, top-down. Clean white background per cell. Thin borders. Uniform studio lighting, 8K, 2000x2000px
3x3 color variation grid. Same {product} in 9 different colors, identical 3/4 angle. Clean white cells, subtle drop shadow. Professional catalog, 8K, 2000x2000px
